name: CYMOS Browser Companion
description: An opt-in, local-first browsing guide for CYMOS.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'; form-action 'none'
